text_block_list.text:
During our training meeting, Biwa Hayahide gives
out a sudden exclamation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What?! Objection! The defendant's explanation
is—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Ahem. Excuse me. Please continue as you were.
choice_data_list: What kind of dream were you having?
What kind of dream were you having?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Um... You know that courtroom TV drama
everyone's been talking about? It was about
that...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Please, don't ask me any more. I'm already
embarrassed about that little outburst...

However, another "Objection!" rings out ten
minutes later. It seems like Biwa Hayahide's not
getting enough sleep.
